name: anthrosidian
description: AI-first personal knowledge base operated by agents: gated writes (dedup/supersede), grep-first recall with honest abstention, episodic logging, and sleep-phase consolidation over plain markdown + git

interface.shortDescription: AI-first personal knowledge base operated by agents
interface.longDescription: Anthrosidian turns a plain markdown + git directory into a knowledge base whose sole consumer is an AI agent: writes go through a dedup/supersede gate, recall is grep-first with honest abstention, sessions append to an episodic log, and a consolidation phase dedups, resolves contradictions, and sweeps stale knowledge.
defaultPrompt: Remember this insight in my knowledge base.
What does my knowledge base say about this?
